meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Fast-Track User Onboarding: Beat Slow Dev Speeds (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on repetitive onboarding. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-converting user flows in record time.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed stems from manual, repetitive scaffolding. By automating user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code, you eliminate boilerplate overhead. This approach forces a modular architecture, enabling you to ship production-ready, interactive flows in minutes rather than days, significantly increasing your billable velocity and client satisfaction.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the requirements are shifting, and your project velocity has hit a wall. Every hour spent manually wiring up sign-up forms, email verification, and welcome tours is an hour stolen from high-value features. You aren't just building an app; you are fighting the friction of standard implementation.

Relief arrives through total automation. By integrating Antigravity’s structural generation with the raw reasoning power of Claude Code, we can transform the tedious onboarding process into a repeatable, high-speed asset. Stop coding like it’s 2015 and start architecting at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Establish the data requirements and user states for your onboarding flow to ensure type-safety from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript interface for a multi-step user onboarding flow including profile data, preference selection, and progress tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding schema with zod validation'

steps.title: Generate Modular UI Components
steps.description: Create reusable, headless UI components that handle state transitions without complex prop-drilling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a headless stepper component using Radix UI patterns that manages transition states between onboarding steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate stepper component using tailwind and react'

steps.title: Implement State Orchestration
steps.description: Use a centralized state machine to handle edge cases in the onboarding journey, such as interruptions or network failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a state machine logic for onboarding using XState or a simple reducer pattern to track step completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement state management for onboarding flow'

steps.title: Integrate Persistence Layer
steps.description: Connect the onboarding data to your backend API to ensure progress is saved across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a service layer function to persist partial onboarding progress to a PostgreSQL database via Prisma.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create prisma mutation for onboarding progress'

steps.title: Automate Testing and Verification
steps.description: Ensure the flow is bulletproof by generating unit tests for every transition state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Vitest unit tests for the onboarding state machine, covering all possible navigation paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate vitest suite for onboarding logic'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Save-as-you-go' strategy in onboarding to prevent data loss during network drops.
Implement a 'skip-to-dashboard' option if your user base is technical to maximize conversion.
Use Claude Code to refactor your onboarding CSS into a single theme file for instant global styling updates.
Tag your onboarding events with analytics tracking inside the state machine to identify drop-off points.
Keep onboarding steps under 60 seconds of interaction time to maintain high user engagement.
content.next_steps: After deploying your onboarding flow, integrate a feedback loop using an automated email trigger or a post-onboarding modal to gather user sentiment.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to crush development bottlenecks and deliver enterprise-grade onboarding in a fraction of the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
